windows.embed_text_v2: setting poured wax candles in silicone moulds, blue scallop mould of pale yellow wax and pink star mould of red wax curing with cotton wicks held centered by metal wick bars, crayon colorant jars nearby
windows.summary_v2: Two silicone moulds of freshly poured yellow and red wax sit cooling and setting on a table while metal bars hold their cotton wicks centered.

tags_v2.action: wax setting and curing in moulds with centered wicks

seconds_v2.desc: Top-down close view of two silicone moulds on a white table: a blue scallop mould holding pale yellow wax and a pink star mould holding red wax, each with a metal wick-centering bar laid across the top holding a cotton wick upright.
Camera pulls back; both poured moulds sit setting with wick bars in place, surrounded by colored crayons in a zip bag, two small jars of yellow and pink colorant, and white seashells.
Static overhead of the curing candles; the yellow wax in the blue mould and red wax in the pink mould are firming, wicks held centered by the clip bars.
Same arrangement, slight reframe; the two filled moulds continue to cool and set with their wick holders, supplies (crayons, colorant jars, shells) laid out around them.
Closer angle on the two setting moulds; surface of the red and yellow wax glossy as it cures, cotton wicks upright in the centering bars.
Overhead view of both moulds setting; the pale yellow and red poured wax remain in their silicone shapes with wick bars across them.
Continued shot of the two curing candles on the table, wicks centered by metal bars, colorant jars and crayons visible at top of frame.
Tight top-down on the two moulds; metal wick bars rest directly on the firming yellow and red wax surfaces, candles nearly set.
